hero.title: Engineering Excellence
hero.subtitle: Delivering sustainable infrastructure and innovative solutions worldwide

introduction.title: Who We Are
introduction.content: We are a global engineering consultancy dedicated to creating opportunities through the responsible development of sustainable infrastructure. Our multidisciplinary team of experts works across diverse environments and industries, delivering innovative engineering solutions to complex challenges. By combining technical excellence, practical experience, and a forward-thinking approach, we partner with clients to design and deliver projects that strengthen communities, support economic growth, and improve quality of life. Our work is guided by a commitment to long-term sustainability, collaboration, and engineering solutions that make a meaningful and lasting impact.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content: To open opportunities with connected thinking, making infrastructure that improves life and delivers a better world.

values.title: Progress
values.description: We bring a spirit of curiosity and innovation to every project, constantly pushing boundaries to find better solutions.

values.title: Respect
values.description: We value diversity and treat everyone with dignity, creating an inclusive environment where all voices are heard.

values.title: Integrity
values.description: We act honestly and ethically in all our dealings, building trust through transparency and accountability.

values.title: Excellence
values.description: We pursue the highest standards in everything we do, delivering quality outcomes that exceed expectations.

heritage.title: Our Heritage
heritage.content: Founded in 1989 through the merger of Mott, Hay and Anderson and Sir M MacDonald & Partners, we brought together two firms with over a century of engineering excellence. Today, we continue that proud tradition, working on some of the world's most challenging and exciting infrastructure projects.
